summary: Frontend testing of FitMaxPro media features (images and videos for exercises, supplements, and meals). All main features working correctly - images load from Pexels, YouTube video modal functions properly, Meals tab displays macros correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Language display shows raw locale 'EN-US@POSIX' instead of normalized 'EN' or 'FR'
ui_bugs.fix: In Navigation.js line 107, normalize i18n.language before display: use i18n.language?.startsWith('fr') ? 'FR' : 'EN'

ui_bugs.issue: First exercise 'Échauffement cardio' shows broken image (alt text visible instead of image)
ui_bugs.fix: Verify Pexels image URL in database for first exercise

integration_issues.issue: Login API succeeds but UI stays on login page - no redirect to /dashboard. User shows in navbar but ProtectedRoute redirects back to login
integration_issues.details: Login API returns 200 with valid session_token and user data, but the page doesn't navigate. The authContext might not be updating properly after login.

issues: Some YouTube videos show 'Video unavailable' - this is content issue, not code issue. Video IDs may be private/deleted on YouTube

passed_tests: Workouts page displays workout cards with Pexels images
Workout detail page shows exercise images (6 out of 7 exercises have working images)
Watch Video buttons are present for all exercises (7 buttons found)
Video modal opens correctly on 'Watch Video' click
YouTube iframe embeds with correct src and autoplay
Video modal close button (X) works correctly
Supplements page displays pack header images
Nutrients tab shows supplement cards with images and dosage badges
Meals tab displays 4 meal cards with food images
Meals show macro information (Cal, Prot, Carb, Fat) with proper values
Tab switching between Supplements and Meals works
Navigation between pages works when using nav clicks (not direct URL)
User authentication shown in navbar (Mouctar Admin, Logout button)
VIP subscription status correctly shows 'Already subscribed' button
action_items: Fix language display in Navigation.js - normalize locale string to show 'EN' or 'FR' instead of 'en-US@POSIX'
Debug login redirect issue - setUser and navigate('/dashboard') called but page doesn't redirect
Verify first exercise image URL in database (Échauffement cardio)
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.js line 107: i18n.language shows raw browser locale. Should use i18n.language?.startsWith('fr') ? 'FR' : 'EN'
LoginPage.js: Login success but no redirect - check if setUser triggers re-render and navigate is working
WorkoutDetailPage.js line 116-135: Conditional rendering of image works, but first exercise image_url might be invalid
seed_data_creation: None - existing user and media data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login via email/password doesn't redirect after success. To test authenticated pages, set localStorage.setItem('session_token', 'session_xxx') before navigating. The user 'msoumah.etion@gmail.com' has VIP subscription. Video modal works but some YouTube videos may be unavailable.
